home.pageTitle: CSV Creator - Free Tools for CSV Files
home.pageDescription: The most complete suite of free online tools to convert, edit, and manage your CSV files. Transform your data to JSON, Excel, PDF, and more.
home.headerSubtitle: Your ultimate toolkit for working with CSV files
home.instruction1: Paste or type your CSV data into the text area.
home.instruction2: Choose one of our powerful tools from the list.
home.instruction3: Transform, edit, or download your data instantly!
home.fileNameDescription: Your file will be downloaded as "{fileName}.csv"
home.csvReady: Your CSV data is ready for action!
home.toolsSectionSubtitle: Convert, edit, and transform your CSV data with our complete selection of free utilities.
home.whatIsCsvText: A CSV (Comma-Separated Values) file is a plain text format that stores tabular data. Each line represents a row of data, and each value within that row is separated by a comma. It's a universally compatible format, ideal for exchanging data between different applications like Excel, Google Sheets, or databases.
home.shareSubtitle: Help us reach more people! Share this tool with your friends or colleagues. We would really appreciate it!

toolpage.toolNotFoundDescription: The tool you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
toolpage.underConstructionText: We are working hard to bring you this amazing tool. Come back soon!
toolpage.addFavoritesToastDescription: You can access this page from your browser's bookmarks.

modals.shareDescription: If you liked {toolTitle}, share it with your friends!

toasts.errorNoCsvDescription: Please paste or write CSV data before downloading.
toasts.errorDownloadingDescription: There was a problem preparing your file.

json-to-csv.title: JSON to CSV
json-to-csv.description: Convert JSON data to CSV format quickly and easily.

csv-to-delimited.title: CSV to Delimited
csv-to-delimited.description: Change the delimiter of your CSV (commas, semicolons, tabs).

csv-to-fixed-width.title: CSV to Fixed-Width
csv-to-fixed-width.description: Convert CSV data to a fixed-width text format.

fixed-width-to-csv.title: Fixed-Width to CSV
fixed-width-to-csv.description: Transform fixed-width text into a well-structured CSV file.

yaml-to-csv.title: YAML to CSV
yaml-to-csv.description: Convert data in YAML format to CSV.

kml-to-csv.title: KML to CSV
kml-to-csv.description: Extract data from a KML file and convert it to CSV.

csv-viewer-editor.title: CSV Viewer and Editor
csv-viewer-editor.description: View, edit, and manipulate your CSV data in an interactive table.

split-csv.title: Split CSV
split-csv.description: Split a large CSV file into several smaller files.

geojson-to-csv.title: GeoJSON to CSV
geojson-to-csv.description: Convert GeoJSON data to CSV format.

html-links-to-csv.title: HTML Links to CSV
html-links-to-csv.description: Extract all links from HTML code and save them in a CSV.

csv-to-markdown.title: CSV to Markdown
csv-to-markdown.description: Convert your CSV data into a Markdown formatted table.

html-table-to-csv.title: HTML Table to CSV
html-table-to-csv.description: Extract data from an HTML table and convert it to CSV.

csv-to-geojson.title: CSV to GeoJSON
csv-to-geojson.description: Convert CSV data with coordinates to GeoJSON format.

email-extractor.title: Email Extractor
email-extractor.description: Extract all email addresses from a text.

phone-extractor.title: Phone Extractor
phone-extractor.description: Extract all phone numbers from a text.

generate-test-data.title: Generate Test Data
generate-test-data.description: Create fake test data in CSV format for your projects.

csv-to-html-mediawiki.title: CSV to HTML/MediaWiki Table
csv-to-html-mediawiki.description: Convert CSV to HTML or MediaWiki compatible tables.

generate-from-template.title: Generate from Template
generate-from-template.description: Generate bulk text using a CSV as a data source for a template.

web-to-text.title: Convert Web to Text
web-to-text.description: Extract readable text from a web page from its URL.

csv-to-word.title: CSV to Word (DOCX)
csv-to-word.description: Convert CSV data to a table in a Word document (.docx).

csv-to-kml.title: CSV to KML
csv-to-kml.description: Convert CSV coordinates into a KML file for maps.

csv-to-pdf.title: CSV to PDF
csv-to-pdf.description: Convert your CSV data into a table within a PDF document.

xml-to-csv.title: XML to CSV
xml-to-csv.description: Transform data from XML format to CSV.

sql-to-csv.title: SQL to CSV
sql-to-csv.description: Convert an SQL dump (INSERTs) into a CSV file.

csv-to-json.title: CSV to JSON
csv-to-json.description: Convert CSV data to JSON format (array of objects).

csv-to-multi-line.title: CSV to Multi-line
csv-to-multi-line.description: Transform each row of a CSV into a formatted text block.

csv-to-sql.title: CSV to SQL
csv-to-sql.description: Generate SQL statements (INSERTs) from your CSV data.

csv-to-xml.title: CSV to XML
csv-to-xml.description: Convert CSV data to an XML formatted file.

csv-to-yaml.title: CSV to YAML
csv-to-yaml.description: Transform data in CSV format to YAML.

url-extractor.title: URL Extractor
url-extractor.description: Extract all URLs (links) from a block of text.

query-csv-with-sql.title: Query CSV with SQL
query-csv-with-sql.description: Run SQL queries directly on your CSV data.

transpose-csv.title: Transpose CSV
transpose-csv.description: Invert the rows and columns of your CSV file.
